original_question: Interpret the microbiology report bundle and generate a concise explanation of which findings support invasive infection versus contamination.
original_answer_text: Treat repeated positive blood cultures with compatible vitals as invasive infection; isolated low-quality positives may be contamination.

medical_concepts: Treat repeated positive blood cultures with compatible vitals as invasive infection; isolated low-quality positives may be contamination.
